bullets: Christian girls in Pakistan vulnerable to abduction, forced conversion, and child marriage, with justice and safe family reunion at stake.
Students, teachers, and market women in northeast Nigeria abducted by armed terrorists, with additional believers killed and seven still held captive by Islamist gunmen.
Congregations in India facing violent mob intimidation, forced church closures, and ongoing threats to livelihoods and freedom of worship.
Christian worshippers in Indonesia whose prayer house was attacked by a mob demanding its forced closure and who suffered physical assault.
Ukrainian civilians and the broader religious community amid ongoing missile and drone strikes destroying centuries-old sacred and cultural heritage sites.
Medical students and civilians in Kenya caught in crossfire between security forces and criminal gangs, with families grieving and communities destabilized.
Kidnapping victims, abducted students and children, and communities living under threat of armed raids across multiple regions of Nigeria.

More than 100,000 families in Myanmar grieving conflict-related deaths over five years of civil war, with 3.7 million displaced, children killed in airstrikes, and a Catholic nun imprisoned for providing healthcare to the displaced.
Displaced families in Gaza facing ongoing airstrikes, destroyed shelters, and worsening humanitarian conditions with no safe refuge.
Eight civilians including teenagers and a health worker killed in Mali while traveling to a market, and communities living under threat of aerial attack.
Aid workers and civilians in South Sudan killed in a convoy ambush, with relief operations disrupted and grieving families left without support.
Civilians in Syria living amid ongoing airstrikes and active militant sleeper cells in northwestern communities.
Civilians in Somalia living near armed militant strongholds amid continued airstrikes and armed operations.
Sailors detained and coastal communities in Yemen caught in ongoing maritime conflict and weapons smuggling.
Hundreds of thousands of civilians in Sudan facing drone strikes and displacement as another major city risks falling to armed forces.
Kurdish civilians and security personnel in Iran caught in spreading armed clashes across Kurdish-majority border regions.
Thousands of African migrants in South Africa fleeing vigilante mob violence, forced displacement, and anti-immigrant unrest across multiple cities.
Nigerien soldiers captured and border communities exposed to repeated armed group raids on military bases.
Journalists in Mexico killed or endangered while reporting on cartel violence, with colleagues facing ongoing threats.
Civilians in Afghanistan and Pakistan's border regions caught in cross-border drone strikes and escalating military exchanges.
Activists, journalists, lawyers, and civil society members in Turkey detained without charge amid sweeping security operations.
Civilians in Ukraine killed and injured in overnight drone attacks on residential and civilian infrastructure.
Muslim worshippers in Ireland whose prayer hall was destroyed in a suspected arson attack, and a community shaken by religious-targeted violence.
Civilians and communities in Iraq caught between armed militia factions and a government disarmament deadline with uncertain outcomes.
Thousands of citizens in Serbia seeking accountability and democratic elections amid a prolonged political crisis.
Three people including a child critically wounded by a parcel bomb attack in Monaco.
Tens of thousands of seafarers and maritime workers endangered by drone strikes in the Strait of Hormuz.
Senegalese civilians and opposition voices amid a deepening political and constitutional crisis.
Russian civilians facing fuel shortages and rationing as energy infrastructure is repeatedly struck.
Six employees killed at a youth welfare facility in Germany, and their grieving families and traumatized colleagues.
Civilians and communities in Iraq navigating the risks of militia disarmament deadlines and potential armed conflict.
Ghanaian families — at least thirteen killed and hundreds displaced by severe flooding, with more rain forecast and rising casualty fears.
United States communities across Kentucky, Colorado, Utah, and Montana facing flood deaths, wildfire fatalities including fallen firefighters, and ongoing displacement.
Belgian residents of a multi-storey apartment building killed and injured in a devastating fire, with families left homeless.
Greek residents and families grieving two deaths and a missing child as a wildfire burns near a major northern city.
Italian families evacuated across southern mainland and island regions by storm-driven flooding and infrastructure damage, alongside ongoing lava flows from an active volcano.
Ugandan communities in the west facing a potential Marburg virus case while health workers simultaneously manage an Ebola response.
Filipino communities near an active volcano affected by a phreatomagmatic eruption and potential ashfall and displacement.
Austrian visitors and workers stranded after multiple mudslides destroyed a key valley road following heavy rainfall.
